description:
A powerful and versatile Slicer for Resin and Filament 3D Printers

With Lychee Slicer, you get the best companion to prepare 3D models for your Resin and Filament 3D Printers. Get access to many features to create a tailored and smooth workflow that fits your needs! Lychee Slicer is easy to use and provides powerful tools in an elegant and intuitive interface. Always be at the edge of 3D Printing with Lychee Slicer!
This release fixes a series of island detection bugs and resolves the FDM slicing freeze introduced, so you can get back to printing with stability. Read the changelog for the rest of the updates.
New 🎉
- New Authentification Process: Initial connection with Gmail and other authentication now happens directly in your browser, making the login experience more reliable.
- New Resin Printer Support - Athena II: The Athena II printer profile has been added to the printer library with optimized default resin settings.
Fixed 🐞
1. Series of Fixes on the Island Detector feature
Fixed island search bug when using multiplate because islands were not properly detected across plates.
Fixed islands being reported off-side from the actual model position.
Fixed islands moving to wrong positions after a z or x movement was applied to the model.
Fixed island detector misbehaving after selecting invisible objects.
Fixed islands being incorrectly restored from .lys project files.
Fixed incorrect island count displayed in the Export menu.
2. Fixed FDM freeze on Slicing
Filament users on 7.5.5 were hitting a freeze that prevented any slice from completing. This has been fully fixed.
Improvements ⚙️
Global Performance Optimisation: Overall performance has been improved across the board. Most notably, project files now load twice as fast on open.
